title: [kimi-review] 94f2e21: [SEVERITY: medium] Unverifiable fix: a commit claiming to fi
description:
Commit: 94f2e2147
Message: fix(schc): prevent integer overflow in uncompressed fallback

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] Unverifiable fix: a commit claiming to fix an integer overflow with no visible code changes could indicate an empty commit, an incomplete push, or changes applied to the wrong branch. Worth verifying the commit actually contains the intended fix (e.g., `git show --stat 94f2e21`).
